summary: W1306 proves W945 localized-unit unpacking does not close the original four-task contract: W945 opens to localized right adjoint, localized adjunction, and W939 unit-component witness, while its primitive route expands to eight inputs, all larger than the remaining W1270 one-input W987 surface.
